_comment: Gold for ex3 (BM25, K1=1.5, B=0.75, section chunks). recall@k over the 7 clean queries using the answer_contains oracle. Q4 (paraphrase 'keep employees from leaving' -> 'attrition') is the one BM25 buries (gold at rank 4) — that's the motivation for semantic search.

bm25_misses.why: no shared rare terms with the section text
